name: arm-reach-vla
title: Reach a target with the end-effector (SmolVLA policy)
summary: The arm-reach skill driven by a real learned Vision-Language-Action policy (SmolVLA, 450M). Same contract, safety envelope, transport, and eval harness as arm-reach — only the policy block (and its observation/sensor needs) changed.
task: Reach the target with the end effector

policy.note: The one that swapped in. Contract/safety/transport/eval unchanged from arm-reach; the analytic P-controller became a real VLA. Weights run in-browser on WebGPU.

pre: robot homed — current q is known
invariants: no NaN or non-finite command ever reaches the driver

eval.note: Runs in-browser (WebGPU) with real camera frames — not in the Node harness, which validates the contract + safety wrapping.
